venues.title: Beauty Flower
venues.description: Nikohlarga maxsus go'zallik saloni. Makiyaj, soch turmaklash va spa xizmatlari.

venues.title: Elite Kortej
venues.description: Hashamatli nikoh kortejlari. Mercedes, BMW va Rolls-Royce avtomobillari ijarasiga.

venues.title: Jahongir Tojimatov
venues.description: Tajribali to'y boshlovchisi. O'zbek va rus tillarida professional boshlovchilik xizmati.

venues.title: Sardor Xasanov
venues.description: Zamonaviy uslubda to'y va tadbirlarni olib boruvchi professional boshlovchi.

venues.title: Bobur Rahimov
venues.description: 10 yillik tajribaga ega boshlovchi. Hazilkash va jonli muloqot uslubi.

venues.title: Sherzod Tursunov
venues.description: O'zbek, rus va ingliz tillarida boshlovchilik. Xalqaro tadbirlar mutaxassisi.

venues.title: Serenada
venues.description: Termizdagi eng katta va hashamatli to'yxona. 1000 kishilik zal, ajoyib manzara.

venues.description: Italyan uslubidagi klassik sartaroshxona. Dadillik va nafosatning uyg'unligi.

venues.title: Beauty day
venues.description: Kelin sochini va makiyajini tayyorlashda O'zbekistondagi eng yaxshi salon.
